description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add an ipxe_build job that runs on the debian:stable Docker image, executes a before_script to add a deb-src entry and install git, build-essential, devscripts and wget, then runs apt install of liblzma-dev, isolinux, curl, fuseiso, genisoimage, mtools, syslinux; downloads three certificate files with curl; clones the ipxe repository, applies a patch, builds ipxe binaries with make using EMBED, CERT, TRUST and DEBUG=x509 flags for usb, iso, EFI and legacy images; creates temporary mount points, mounts the iso with fuseiso, copies files, unmounts, generates hybrid and EFI ISO images with genisoimage, moves the built binaries to project files, and finally archives boot.php, shadow_bg.png, all generated .efi, .img and .iso files as artifacts named IPXE-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME that expire in two days. In the deploy stage add a deploy_stable job that runs manually only on the master branch or tags, sets the environment to Stable, and uses scp to copy boot.php, shadow_bg.png and ShadowBoot_$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME.efi from the project directory to stable@172.20.1.251 under the specified web paths; the job is tagged with shadow, bionic and ubuntu runner tags.
